title: RL Correctness Gate and Production-Path Freeze

rl/p3_04_correctness.py.task: Tasks 1, 2, 3, 5, 6: Multi-epoch GRPO, deterministic forward, complete MDP state, codon action, production path gate

test_methods.name: test_ratio_approx_one_before_update
test_methods.assertion: max|ratio - 1.0| < 1e-4 before any optimizer step

test_methods.name: test_ratio_changes_after_update
test_methods.assertion: any|ratio - 1.0| > 1e-4 after weight perturbation

test_methods.name: test_clip_fraction_zero_when_ratio_in_range
test_methods.assertion: clip_fraction == 0.0 when all ratios in [1-eps, 1+eps]

test_methods.name: test_clip_fraction_nonzero_when_ratio_out_of_range
test_methods.assertion: clip_fraction > 0.0 when some ratios outside range

test_methods.name: test_clip_fraction_bounded_01
test_methods.assertion: 0.0 <= clip_fraction <= 1.0 for random inputs

test_methods.name: test_grad_nograd_match
test_methods.assertion: same params + same state + same mask → same distribution (grad vs no-grad, finite values only)

test_methods.name: test_kl_nonnegative
test_methods.assertion: KL >= -1e-7 for fixed distributions

test_methods.name: test_kl_nonnegative_random
test_methods.assertion: KL >= -1e-7 for random distributions

test_methods.name: test_legal_actions_match_between_calls
test_methods.assertion: legal action IDs identical between two constrained_distribution calls

test_methods.name: test_complete_step_has_all_fields
test_methods.assertion: CompletePolicyStep has all 13 required fields

test_methods.name: test_mask_hash_recoverable
test_methods.assertion: action_mask_hash recoverable from legal_action_ids

test_methods.name: test_all_negative_makes_stop_preferred
test_methods.assertion: all soft objectives negative → stop_preferred=True, scalar <= 0

test_methods.name: test_positive_te_makes_edit_preferred
test_methods.assertion: positive TE exceeding costs → stop_preferred=False, scalar > 0

test_methods.name: test_hard_failure_forces_stop
test_methods.assertion: hard constraint violation → stop_preferred=True, hard_constraint_gated=True, scalar < 0

test_methods.name: test_all_synonymous_actions_preserve_protein
test_methods.assertion: all synonymous codon actions preserve protein, n_violations=0

test_methods.name: test_apply_codon_action_preserves_protein
test_methods.assertion: applying a codon action preserves protein

test_methods.name: test_codon_action_no_single_nt_intermediate
test_methods.assertion: codon action is atomic (no single-nt intermediate)

test_methods.name: test_reference_params_unchanged_after_update
test_methods.assertion: reference policy parameters bitwise unchanged after optimizer step

test_methods.name: test_four_distinct_sources
test_methods.assertion: 4 distinct source sequences with different properties

test_methods.name: test_four_sources_produce_trajectories
test_methods.assertion: each source produces a non-empty trajectory

test_methods.name: test_save_load_roundtrip
test_methods.assertion: save/load roundtrip preserves model state and log-probs

acceptance_criteria.description: legacy artifact rejected by paper loader

test_methods.name: test_paper_loader_rejects_legacy
test_methods.assertion: load_for_paper raises ValueError for legacy checkpoint

test_methods.name: test_paper_loader_accepts_production
test_methods.assertion: load_for_paper accepts production checkpoint

test_methods.name: test_classify_checkpoint
test_methods.assertion: classify_checkpoint returns correct type for legacy/production

test_methods.name: test_reward_is_source_normalized_delta
test_methods.assertion: reward scalar equals source-normalized delta

test_methods.name: test_stop_reward_is_zero_delta
test_methods.assertion: STOP reward vector is all zeros (source baseline)

test_methods.name: test_hard_failure_zeroes_relative_to_source
test_methods.assertion: hard failure scalar is -1.0 relative to source

test_methods.name: test_uncertainty_not_double_subtracted
test_methods.assertion: uncertainty subtracted exactly once (no double-subtraction)

bugs_identified.description: model.eval() for sampling then model.train() for update → dropout corrupts PPO ratio
risk_adjusted_reward computed but never used for advantage (audit-only dead code)
Does not enforce eval/train mode (root cause of dropout bug)
Uses GRPOREINFORCE (raw REINFORCE, not clipped); --kl-coef is dead code; max_steps defaults to limit (1024) → memory blow-up; reference policy not frozen

unresolved_risks: Existing modules not modified in-place; drop-in replacements must be wired into production training loop in P3-06/P3-08
No real MRNAEditFormer tested; DummyModel used for acceptance tests
No GPU smoke test; all tests run on CPU
CodonAction not integrated into build_legal_action_mask; integration deferred to P3-06
